cms.task_text: Seřaďte bloky tak, aby želva nakreslila [hlp]číslici 7[/hlp] (horní tah 60 bodů, svislý tah 80 bodů).
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_right" id="b1" x="20" y="20"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="b2" x="180" y="20"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="b3" x="100" y="150"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" id="b2" x="50" y="50"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="b1"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b3"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block></next></block></next></block></xml>

testing_js.poznamka: Paste do testing.js pro lokální otestování v sandboxu
